channel.title: Bluetooth on Brain Dump
channel.description: Recent content in Bluetooth on Brain Dump

item.title: Garage door control with Shelly and BLE
item.description: Garage doors usually come with proprietary remotes, which may have drawbacks. This page explains how to replace remotes for the Entrematic Magic 600-2, with the Shelly 1 Gen3 relay and the Shelly BLU Button Tough 1. DISCLAIMER: Electricity is dangerous, garage doors as well. I don’t take any responsibility if something goes wrong by following those instructions. If you’re unsure, ask a professional. Analysing the door operator My Entrematic Magic 600-2 has RJ10 inputs at the back.
